channel.title: HopoZ Site
channel.description: 神说要有光，于是有了光

item.title: {{ replace .File.ContentBaseName "-" " " | title }}
item.author: HopoZ
item.description: Plugin org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-jar-plugin:1.8.1 or one of its dependencies could not be resolved: Failure to find org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-jar-plugin:jar:1.8.1 in https://maven.aliyun.com/repository/public was cached in the local repository, resolution will not be reattempted until the update interval of aliyunmaven has elapsed or updates are forced -> [Help 1] [ERROR] default settings，setting只是对当前项目进行

item.title: {{ replace .File.ContentBaseName "-" " " | title }}
item.author: HopoZ
item.description: etc Language Server Protocol (LSP) 在 Neovim 中运行 :PackerSync 命令来安装或更新插件: 布局，搜索，点命令，寄存器，宏，撤销，折叠。。。一些有用的思想，当然，我觉得vim最本质的优点是

item.title: {{ replace .File.ContentBaseName "-" " " | title }}
item.author: HopoZ
item.description: 快照 CRLF Carriage Return Line Feed 回车换行符，*unix上是LF touch filename 生成新文件 ENOENT Error NO ENTity 挂载主机共享文件夹

item.title: {{ replace .File.ContentBaseName "-" " " | title }}
item.author: HopoZ
item.description: 已经实现： cpg生成C++常用结构snippets ctrl+j生成新空白行,ctrl+l相当于右箭头 弃用以上，还是用回了nvim，编程式移动

item.title: {{ replace .File.ContentBaseName "-" " " | title }}
item.author: HopoZ
item.description: gpt原理 GPT（Generative Pre-trained Transformer）是一个基于Transformer架构的生成式预训练模型，广泛用于各种自然语言

item.title: {{ replace .File.ContentBaseName "-" " " | title }}
item.author: HopoZ
item.description: C++ cs架构client-server模式 我把快捷方式里的alt加数字改成了ctl加数字 stl containers algorithms iterators freopen("1.out","w",stdout); 通常，编写清晰、容易理解的代码比使用语言的晦

item.description: <unistd.h> 的名字来源于“Unix standard”（Unix标准）的缩写。这个头文件定义了符合POSIX（Portable Operating System Interface，可
